messages.content:
You are an expert LaTeX-to-Typst converter.

Follow the conversion request exactly. Produce a complete standalone Typst
0.14.2 document with maximum visual fidelity. Preserve all visible content and
document order; do not summarize, omit, or invent content. Source graphics
listed in the request are available at the listed relative paths during
compilation and may be used with `#image`.

Use valid native Typst syntax and prefer simple structures that compile. Do not
copy LaTeX commands directly into Typst math or markup. Return only the complete
Typst source in one `typst` code block, with no explanation.

The previous Typst document failed to compile. This is the only repair attempt.

Use the exact compiler output below to fix the failure. Simplify the surrounding
structure when necessary; do not repeat an invalid construction unchanged.
Return the complete corrected Typst document, not a diff or excerpt. Preserve
all original visible content and return raw Typst source only, with no Markdown
fences or explanation.

--- compiler output ---
error: expected length or auto, found float
   ┌─ results/ai_latex_to_typst/openrouter/google_gemini-3.1-flash-lite/expansion_32_claude_prompt_v1/samples/i2s_plot_002/attempt_1.typ:15:30
   │
15 │     #let dot = circle(radius: 0.05, fill: black)
   │                               ^^^^
--- end compiler output ---
